## WidgetParams type

The parameters for configuring a custom widget.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type WidgetParams<W extends WidgetDesc = WidgetDesc> = ElementParams & (W extends WidgetBaseDesc ? Omit<W, "x" | "y" | "width" | "height" | "name" | "tooltip" | "isVisible" | "isDisabled"> : never);
```
**References:** [ElementParams](./openrct2-flexui.elementparams.md)
